name: codex-ultrawork
description: Inject the ultrawork orchestration directive and sync the ultrawork reviewer agent role.

interface.shortDescription: Inject ultrawork directive and reviewer agent role
interface.longDescription: Codex Ultrawork detects the `ultrawork` or `ulw` keyword (word-bounded, case-insensitive) and injects a compact orchestration directive: bind a goal with explicit success criteria, open a durable /tmp notepad, register obsessive todos, run a scenario-driven execution loop with manual-QA evidence, and trigger the bundled GPT-5.2 xhigh `codex-ultrawork-reviewer` role on rigorous/large/long-running work. A `SessionStart` hook syncs bundled agent TOML files into `CODEX_HOME/agents`.
defaultPrompt: ultrawork: refactor this module end-to-end with QA evidence.
ulw: fix this bug, add scenarios, get GPT-5.2 xhigh approval.
